roadmap.title: Finish onboarding and learn Cashout
roadmap.description: Complete the Season 11 tutorial, create a contestant, revive a teammate, insert a cash box, and finish the first Quick Cash rounds. These actions establish every core input used later.

roadmap.title: Rotate Builds and modes from the start
roadmap.description: Play ten rounds with each Build, join party and Tournament rounds, and begin banking cash. Keep Light, Medium, and Heavy usage balanced so the three 150-win grinds progress together.

roadmap.title: Clear objective and situational challenges
roadmap.description: Watch for cash-box carries, active steals, late timers, zipline fights, carriables, Jump Pads, emote timing, and Seoul. Set up the rare ten- and fifteen-second chains with teammates weakening clustered opponents.

roadmap.title: Finish combat and support counters
roadmap.description: Use ranged, melee, gadget, fire, gas, healing, blocking, reviving, and destruction-focused loadouts until every cumulative combat and support counter is complete.

roadmap.title: Complete the long wins and cash grind
roadmap.description: Finish 150 wins with each Build and continue maximizing end-of-match cash until the career total reaches 50,000,000. Do not rely on Cashout Bots while Embark is actively changing that mode's progression.

achievements.description: Create a contestant
achievements.summary: Create one additional contestant from the @loc{Contestants} selection.

guide.context: A new account already contains default contestants; the achievement requires creating another contestant slot rather than merely editing an existing Build.

steps.text: Open Contestants from the main menu, select an empty contestant slot, choose a Build, and confirm creation.

achievements.description: Insert a cash box into a cashout station
achievements.summary: Carry a @item{cash box} to a @loc{cashout station} and insert the box.

guide.context: Inserting the box begins the cashout timer immediately; the team does not need to retain or finish that cashout for this introductory achievement.

steps.text: Open a vault, pick up its cash box, carry the box to a cashout station, and use the station's deposit interaction.

achievements.description: Revive a teammate
achievements.summary: Complete one revive on an eliminated teammate during a live round.

guide.context: A manual revive and the Medium Build's @item{Defibrillator} both qualify; the teammate must be revivable rather than still alive or already respawned.

steps.text: Approach a teammate's revive statue after an elimination and complete the manual revive, or use a Defibrillator on the statue.

achievements.description: Play 3 rounds of Quick Cash
achievements.summary: Finish 3 complete rounds in @mechanic{Quick Cash}.

guide.context: Quick Cash is the required playlist; Tournament and standard Cashout rounds do not substitute for this three-round counter.

steps.text: Select Quick Cash from the Play screen and remain through the result screen in three separate rounds.

achievements.description: Play 10 rounds with a Light Build
achievements.summary: Finish 10 rounds while using a @mechanic{Light Build}.

guide.context: Only completed rounds advance this introductory Build counter, so leaving before the result screen risks losing credit.

steps.text: Select a Light contestant before deployment and finish ten full rounds with the Light Build active.

achievements.description: Play 10 rounds with a Medium Build
achievements.summary: Finish 10 rounds while using a @mechanic{Medium Build}.

guide.context: This counter is independent from the Light and Heavy counters and advances through completed match results.

steps.text: Select a Medium contestant before deployment and finish ten full rounds with the Medium Build active.

achievements.description: Play 10 rounds with a Heavy Build
achievements.summary: Finish 10 rounds while using a @mechanic{Heavy Build}.

guide.context: Heavy rounds also create progress toward destruction, blocking, fire, gadget, and melee milestones when the loadout is chosen accordingly.

steps.text: Select a Heavy contestant before deployment and finish ten full rounds with the Heavy Build active.

achievements.description: Play 3 Tournament rounds
achievements.summary: Complete 3 individual rounds inside @mechanic{Tournament} matches.

guide.context: The requirement counts tournament rounds, not three complete tournament victories; advancing in one tournament can supply more than one round.

steps.text: Queue for Tournament and play through three round result screens.

achievements.description: Play 10 rounds in a Party
achievements.summary: Finish 10 rounds while grouped in a party with at least one other player.

guide.context: Matchmade teammates are not the same as a preformed party; join or invite another player before entering the queue.

steps.text: Form a party from the social menu, queue for any supported mode, and finish ten rounds without dissolving the party.

achievements.description: Obtain a total of 100,000 cash
achievements.summary: Accumulate a career total of 100,000 cash from match results.

guide.context: The cash total persists between matches, so a single 100,000-cash result is unnecessary.

steps.text: Open vaults, start or steal cashouts, collect mode-specific cash, and finish matches until the career cash counter reaches 100,000.

achievements.description: Complete the Tutorial
achievements.summary: Open the @loc{Academy} and finish the current Season 11 tutorial.

guide.context: Season 11 replaced the older onboarding flow with the Early Talent Program and an expanded tutorial that transitions into an open Cashout match against bots.

steps.text: Select Academy from the main menu, launch the introductory Tutorial, and complete every prompted Vault, cash-box, cashout, movement, and combat objective until the tutorial result appears.

achievements.description: Revive teammates 50 times
achievements.summary: Complete 50 teammate revives across any number of live rounds.

guide.context: Manual revives and Medium Defibrillator revives both contribute to the same persistent counter.

steps.text: Prioritize collecting teammate revive statues and finish the revive interaction whenever a safe opportunity appears until 50 revives register.

achievements.description: Deal 1,000,000 damage to arenas
achievements.summary: Inflict a cumulative 1,000,000 damage on arena walls, floors, and buildings.

guide.context: The target is environmental structure damage, not damage to contestants or shields; destructive Heavy equipment accelerates progress.

steps.text: Use explosive canisters, grenades, RPG attacks, Charge 'N' Slam, and other destruction tools on intact walls, floors, ceilings, and supports during every round until the arena-damage counter reaches 1,000,000.

achievements.description: Get 300 eliminations with Ranged Weapons
achievements.summary: Earn 300 opponent eliminations credited to ranged weapons.

guide.context: The weapon must receive elimination credit; assists and final damage from fire, gas, gadgets, melee attacks, or carriables advance different categories.

steps.text: Use a firearm, bow, or other ranged primary weapon for finishing damage until 300 ranged-weapon eliminations register.

achievements.description: Get 150 eliminations with Melee Weapons
achievements.summary: Earn 150 opponent eliminations credited to melee weapons.

guide.context: Season 11 reworked melee combat. The cited routes recommend the Heavy @item{Sledgehammer} or a Light Sword/Dagger, so choose one Build and learn its current attack timing.

steps.text: Equip a melee primary weapon, close distance on weakened opponents, and deliver the finishing melee damage until the counter reaches 150.

achievements.description: Get 150 eliminations with Gadgets
achievements.summary: Earn 150 opponent eliminations credited to gadgets.

guide.context: A weapon or environmental elimination does not contribute; the cited reliable damage sources include @item{Explosive Mines} and RPG attacks.

steps.text: Place damaging gadgets on objectives and common routes, or use an RPG on weakened opponents, until gadget damage receives 150 elimination credits.

achievements.description: Block a total of 25,000 damage
achievements.summary: Absorb a cumulative 25,000 incoming damage with defensive barriers or shields.

guide.context: The Heavy Mesh Shield, Dome Shield, and Barricades are cited qualifying defenses; damage that misses the defense or strikes the contestant directly does not add blocked value.

steps.text: Deploy a qualifying shield or barrier between enemies and a contested objective, keep the defense facing incoming fire, and accumulate 25,000 absorbed damage.

achievements.description: Heal teammates for a total of 25,000 health
achievements.summary: Restore a cumulative 25,000 health to injured teammates.

guide.context: Healing only counts while a teammate is below maximum health; the Medium @item{Healing Beam} provides continuous, controllable restoration.

steps.text: Equip the Healing Beam on a Medium Build, follow teammates during fights, and channel it into damaged teammates until 25,000 health has been restored.

achievements.description: Win 150 rounds with a Light Build
achievements.summary: Win 150 rounds with a @mechanic{Light Build} active at the round result.

guide.context: The current route reports that Quickplay modes permitting Build changes credit the Build active at the end, which can reduce time spent on a less-preferred Build.

steps.text: Play for wins in short preferred modes, ensure a Light contestant is active before each winning result is recorded, and continue until 150 Light wins register.

achievements.description: Win 150 rounds with a Medium Build
achievements.summary: Win 150 rounds with a @mechanic{Medium Build} active at the round result.

guide.context: This win counter is separate from the Light and Heavy totals, so rotate Builds throughout the 50-million-cash grind.

steps.text: Ensure a Medium contestant is active whenever a winning round ends and accumulate 150 credited Medium wins.

achievements.description: Win 150 rounds with a Heavy Build
achievements.summary: Win 150 rounds with a @mechanic{Heavy Build} active at the round result.

guide.context: Short Quickplay modes and a coordinated party improve win throughput; Cashout Bots progression is currently changing and is not required by this route.

steps.text: Ensure a Heavy contestant is active whenever a winning round ends and accumulate 150 credited Heavy wins.

achievements.description: Obtain a total of 50,000,000 cash
achievements.summary: Accumulate 50,000,000 cash across completed match results.

guide.context: Cash shown at the end of a match contributes whether the team wins or loses. Current routes estimate 500–700 hours and favor Bank It when available or regular/Ranked Cashout over Quick Cash; Embark is still changing Cashout Bots progression.

steps.text: In Bank It, prioritize collecting and depositing coins instead of chasing fights; in Cashout, open and deposit as many successive vault boxes as the match permits.
Remain through every match result so earned cash records, avoid Ranked team wipes that remove cash, and continue until the career total reaches 50,000,000.

achievements.description: Win the final round in Tournament or Ranked Tournament
achievements.summary: Win the final round of a @mechanic{Tournament} or @mechanic{Ranked Tournament}.

guide.context: Winning an earlier knockout round only advances the team; the achievement is awarded by the last head-to-head round that decides the tournament champion.

steps.text: Advance through the tournament bracket, reach the final round, and finish that last round in first place.

achievements.description: Eliminate an opponent while they are carrying a cash box, 5 times
achievements.summary: Eliminate 5 opponents while each target is physically carrying a @item{cash box}.

guide.context: The opponent must still be in the cash-box carry animation when elimination credit occurs; dropping or inserting the box ends the valid window.

steps.text: Watch open vaults and routes toward cashout stations, focus the opponent who picks up the cash box, and deliver the elimination before the box is dropped or deposited.
Secure five eliminations under that carry-state condition across any number of rounds.

achievements.description: Eliminate an opponent trying to steal your cashout, 10 times
achievements.summary: Eliminate 10 opponents during their active steal interaction on the team's cashout.

guide.context: An opponent merely standing near the station is insufficient; elimination must occur while the target is attempting to steal a cashout owned by the player's team.

steps.text: Start and defend a cashout, hold cover with sight of the station, and wait for an opponent to begin the steal interaction.
Eliminate the stealing opponent before the interaction finishes and accumulate ten such defenses.

achievements.description: Start a cashout with less than 10 seconds remaining in the match
achievements.summary: Insert a @item{cash box} to start a cashout with fewer than 10 seconds left on the match timer.

guide.context: The condition uses the overall match timer, not the separate cashout countdown. Cashout and Tournament matches are more likely than Quick Cash to reach the full match limit.

steps.text: Secure a cash box near an unused cashout station and protect both until the match timer approaches ten seconds.
Insert the box only after the visible match timer falls below 00:10, causing a new cashout to start before the round expires.

achievements.description: Steal a cashout with less than 10 seconds remaining in the match
achievements.summary: Finish stealing an enemy cashout with fewer than 10 seconds left on the match timer.

guide.context: The steal must complete inside the final ten seconds; starting the interaction before that window is valid if its completion occurs after the timer crosses 00:10.

steps.text: Reach an enemy cashout near the end of a Tournament or Cashout round, clear defenders, and time the steal interaction so its progress completes below 00:10.

achievements.description: Eliminate an opponent while you are riding a Zipline, 10 times
achievements.summary: Eliminate 10 opponents while actively traveling on a horizontal @item{Zipline}.

guide.context: Horizontal arena ziplines and the Medium deployable Zipline are cited as reliable; the older route found vertical ziplines inconsistent.

steps.text: Equip the Medium Zipline or locate a long horizontal arena line near a fight, weaken an opponent, then mount the zipline.
Deliver the elimination before dismounting and accumulate ten zipline eliminations.

achievements.description: Eliminate an opponent while you are on fire, 5 times in a single round
achievements.summary: While the contestant is burning, eliminate 5 opponents during one round.

guide.context: The Heavy Build's larger health pool and teammate healing extend each safe burn window; progress resets when the round ends.

steps.text: Equip Pyro Grenades on a Heavy Build, weaken a nearby opponent, throw fire at the contestant's feet, and finish the target while the burn effect is active.
Use healing between engagements and secure five burning-state eliminations before the same round ends.

achievements.description: Win a round in any mode without being eliminated
achievements.summary: Win one complete round without the contestant being eliminated at any time.

guide.context: A revive means an elimination already occurred, so surviving after revival does not restore eligibility for that round.

steps.text: Play from cover, disengage from losing fights, support objectives at range, and reach a first-place round result without entering the eliminated state.

achievements.description: Eliminate an opponent by bouncing a grenade on a Jump Pad
achievements.summary: Bounce a grenade from a @item{Jump Pad} and make that bounced grenade eliminate an opponent.

guide.context: Arena, friendly, and enemy Jump Pads qualify. A Medium Build can carry its own pad and place it on a predictable cashout approach.

steps.text: Place a Jump Pad near a defended cashout or doorway and weaken an approaching opponent without eliminating the target.
Throw a Frag Grenade onto the pad so the rebound carries the grenade toward the target and its explosion earns the elimination.

achievements.description: Hit an opponent in the head with an explosive carriable
achievements.summary: Strike an opponent's head with a red @item{explosive carriable}.

guide.context: Only a head impact is required; the carriable does not need to explode or eliminate the opponent, and throwing from above improves the angle.

steps.text: Pick up a red explosive canister, move to higher ground above a visible opponent, aim at the head, and throw the canister for a direct impact.

achievements.description: Hit opponents with 3 different carriables within 15 seconds
achievements.summary: Within 15 seconds, hit opponents with 3 separate carriable objects.

guide.context: The objects can be chairs, tables, flowerpots, or arena canisters; eliminations are unnecessary, but every throw must register an opponent impact.

steps.text: Gather three carriables beside a busy objective before starting the attempt.
Throw the first object into an opponent, immediately collect the next staged object, and land all three impacts before 15 seconds elapse.

achievements.description: Eliminate an opponent with a headshot while you are sliding
achievements.summary: Score an opponent elimination with a headshot while actively sliding.

guide.context: The elimination, headshot, and slide must coincide; the Medium Revolver is a cited precision option after teammates weaken the target.

steps.text: Reduce an opponent to one precise shot, sprint toward a clear line of sight, begin a slide, and land the finishing headshot before the slide ends.

achievements.description: Eliminate 3 opponents with 3 different items or carriables within 10 seconds
achievements.summary: Within 10 seconds, eliminate 3 opponents using a different item or carriable for each elimination.

guide.context: Each finishing source must be distinct. A primary weapon, damaging gadget or grenade, and thrown carriable form three qualifying categories.

steps.text: Coordinate teammates to weaken three clustered opponents, then prepare one weapon, one damaging gadget or grenade, and one nearby carriable.
Eliminate the first opponent with the weapon, the second with the gadget or grenade, and the third with the thrown carriable before ten seconds pass from the first elimination.

achievements.description: Eliminate 3 opponents with a Melee Weapon within 10 seconds
achievements.summary: Eliminate 3 opponents with a melee weapon inside one 10-second window.

guide.context: A clustered team must already be weakened enough for immediate finishes; time spent closing long gaps usually breaks the window.

steps.text: Equip a melee primary, have teammates damage three opponents grouped around an objective, and move into melee range before the first finish.
Deliver all three melee elimination blows within ten seconds of the first one.

achievements.description: Finish in first place, 3 times in a row
achievements.summary: Finish in first place in 3 consecutive rounds without an intervening lower result.

guide.context: The streak is based on round placement and resets after any non-first-place finish; consecutive tournament victories can also progress the final-round achievement.

steps.text: Use a coordinated party in a preferred mode and secure three straight first-place result screens.

achievements.description: Eliminate 25 opponents with fire
achievements.summary: Earn 25 opponent eliminations credited to fire damage.

guide.context: Qualifying sources include the Heavy Flamethrower, Pyro Grenades, Pyro Mines, and flame canisters; the final damage must be fire rather than a follow-up weapon shot.

steps.text: Apply fire to weakened opponents and stop using non-fire damage before the target is eliminated, continuing until 25 fire credits register.

achievements.description: Eliminate 25 opponents with gas
achievements.summary: Earn 25 opponent eliminations credited to gas damage.

guide.context: Gas Grenades, Gas Mines, and arena gas canisters qualify; gas is most reliable around confined cashout stations where weakened enemies remain inside the cloud.

steps.text: Place or throw gas on contested objectives, weaken trapped opponents, and let the gas tick deliver the finishing damage until 25 eliminations register.

achievements.description: Get a headshot elimination with the last bullet in the magazine of your primary weapon
achievements.summary: Use the final loaded shot of a primary weapon to score a headshot elimination.

guide.context: A high-damage precision firearm reduces the chance that the final round in the magazine lands as a headshot but fails to finish the target.

steps.text: Leave exactly one round in the primary firearm's magazine, weaken an opponent to that round's headshot damage, aim at the head, and fire the final loaded shot for the elimination.

achievements.description: Eliminate an opponent with a flowerpot
achievements.summary: Eliminate a weakened opponent with a thrown @item{small grass/flower pot} or knee-high clay pot with visible flowers.

guide.context: Vases and some large or tiny pots do not register, so use one of the two confirmed flowerpot shapes.

steps.text: Carry a small grass/flower pot or knee-high clay flowerpot toward a fight, have teammates reduce an opponent to one carriable hit, and throw the pot for the finishing impact.

achievements.description: Eliminate an opponent with a cash box
achievements.summary: Eliminate a weakened opponent with the impact of a thrown @item{cash box}.

guide.context: Cash boxes inflict modest impact damage, so the target must be nearly eliminated before the throw.

steps.text: Carry a cash box into a fight, drop it beside the contestant, damage an opponent to very low health, then pick the box up and throw it directly into that opponent for the elimination.

achievements.description: Throw a cash box into a cashout station from 20 meters away
achievements.summary: Throw a @item{cash box} into a cashout station from at least 20 meters away.

guide.context: The cashout marker displays distance. A running jump and the Heavy Build's stronger throw make the 20-meter arc more practical.

steps.text: Carry the box to an unobstructed line at least 20 meters from the station, verify the marker distance, sprint and jump toward the station, then release the throw so the box lands inside.

achievements.description: Play an emote immediately after eliminating an opponent.
achievements.summary: After eliminating an opponent, immediately play an equipped emote from the emote wheel.

guide.context: Season 11 consolidated emotes onto one wheel and may have cleared older bindings, so equip and test the chosen emote before entering a match.

steps.text: In Contestants customization, bind an emote to the emote wheel, enter a round, earn an opponent elimination, and trigger that emote before taking another action.

achievements.description: Be eliminated by a grenade thrown by the same contestant.
achievements.summary: Use the contestant's own grenade explosion to cause that contestant's elimination.

guide.context: Enemy damage can lower health first, but the owned grenade must receive the final self-elimination credit.

steps.text: Reduce the contestant to low health, throw a Frag Grenade at the contestant's feet, stay inside the blast radius, and let the explosion cause the elimination.

achievements.description: Destroy Seoul's complete skybridge.
achievements.summary: On @loc{Seoul}, destroy the hospital skybridge from end to end until the structure collapses.

guide.context: The bridge is the long elevated connection leading toward the hospital. Official Update 9.7.0 repaired its achievement tracker after the map rework.

steps.text: Deploy on Seoul with a Heavy Sledgehammer or explosives and travel to the hospital skybridge near the map edge.
Break every support and connecting section on both ends, continuing along the span until the whole skybridge falls.

achievements.description: Eliminate an opponent while the contestant is performing an emote.
achievements.summary: Begin an emote, then have previously applied gas or fire damage eliminate an opponent while the emote is still playing.

guide.context: Direct weapon attacks interrupt the emote, so delayed damage-over-time must already be ticking on a nearly eliminated target.

steps.text: Weaken an opponent, apply a Gas Grenade, Pyro Grenade, mine, or damaging canister effect, and watch for continuing damage ticks.
Start an equipped emote before the final gas or fire tick causes the opponent's elimination.

achievements.description: Deflect a meteor with a Jump Pad during the Meteor Showers event.
achievements.summary: During @mechanic{Meteor Showers}, place a Medium @item{Jump Pad} under an incoming meteor and make the meteor bounce.

guide.context: The random event appears after halftime in a small marked area, and meteors share an approach angle that reveals where a pad should face.

steps.text: Enter rounds with a Medium Jump Pad equipped until the Meteor Showers event begins after halftime.
Move into the impact zone, observe the repeated meteor trajectory, and place the Jump Pad beneath the next landing point so a meteor strikes and rebounds from it.

achievements.description: Start a cashout within 15 seconds after opening a vault
achievements.summary: Open a vault and insert its @item{cash box} into a cashout station within 15 seconds.

guide.context: The Light @item{Gateway} has a 50-meter link range and can transport the box automatically; place both endpoints before opening the vault so setup time is outside the 15-second window.

steps.text: Equip Gateway plus Dash or Grappling Hook, place one Gateway endpoint beside the unopened vault's cash box, then move toward a nearby cashout station without exceeding 50 meters and place the exit endpoint.
Return to and open the vault, let the released cash box pass through the first Gateway, collect it at the exit, and use movement abilities to insert it before 15 seconds elapse.

achievements.description: Attach an Explosive Mine to a carriable and eliminate an opponent by throwing the loaded object.
achievements.summary: Throw a carriable fitted with an @item{Explosive Mine} and make its armed explosion eliminate an opponent.

guide.context: Medium and Heavy Builds can equip Explosive Mines. Mines attached to thrown objects need roughly two to three seconds to arm, so a stationary revive interaction offers a predictable target.

steps.text: Attach one or two Explosive Mines to a flammable carriable and wait near a fight until an opponent begins reviving a teammate or remains in a confined area.
Throw the loaded carriable beside the weakened opponent early enough for the mines to arm, then let the attached-mine explosion cause the elimination.
